'''[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Surlev''' was the second-in-command of the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Ion Storm]]'' under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Barse Neomen]]. Surlev acted as the commanding officer of the ''Ion Storm'' whenever his captain was away, which was quite often. However, as a result of Surlev being extremely loyal to [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Newen Streeg]] and Captain Neomen being very disloyal, the captain kept Surlev on a very short leash. Surlev was very dedicated to the idea of cleaning up the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], where he was stationed.
